context: Tests whether the agent correctly treats a README markdown table cell mention (medium confidence) as a propose-only candidate. The table cell contains the symbol name without backtick code spans — the agent must propose a README update, not skip it, and must not auto-write to the markdown file.

checklist.name: JSDoc return updated
checklist.description: src/analytics.ts JSDoc for aggregateMetrics has an updated @returns line mentioning MetricsSummary (or 'summary object' / 'count and average')

checklist.name: README table proposal made
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains a 'Proposed' entry that references README.md and the aggregateMetrics table row

checklist.name: README not auto-written
checklist.description: README.md still contains the original 'Returns a count.' text — the agent did NOT rewrite the README table row

checklist.name: Table mention not skipped
checklist.description: The report does NOT say the README mention was 'Skipped' due to low confidence — table cell matches are medium confidence and should be proposed

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
